facilities.name: SpaceX Starbase
facilities.blurb: SpaceX Starship launch and test site in South Texas; the surrounding company town incorporated as the city of Starbase in May 2025 and now also serves as SpaceX's official corporate headquarters.

facilities.name: SpaceX Hawthorne
facilities.blurb: SpaceX's original campus and a major Falcon 9/Dragon manufacturing site; SpaceX's official corporate headquarters relocated to Starbase, Texas.

facilities.name: Blue Origin Kent
facilities.blurb: Blue Origin headquarters and production campus: BE-4 and New Glenn engineering, BE-3 production, Blue Moon research and development.

facilities.name: Blue Origin Huntsville
facilities.blurb: Rocket engine plant in Cummings Research Park building the BE-4 and BE-3U, opened February 2020.

facilities.name: ICEYE HQ
facilities.blurb: ICEYE headquarters at Maarintie 6, Espoo, Finland.

facilities.name: Planet HQ
facilities.blurb: Planet headquarters at 645 Harrison Street, San Francisco.

facilities.name: Umbra HQ
facilities.blurb: Umbra headquarters in downtown Santa Barbara, California.

facilities.name: BlackSky HQ
facilities.blurb: BlackSky headquarters at 2411 Dulles Corner Park, Herndon, Virginia.

facilities.name: Kineis HQ
facilities.blurb: Kineis headquarters at 11 rue Hermes, Parc Technologique du Canal, Ramonville-Saint-Agne, France.
